name: Freaky Lab
description:
╭⁀৲⁀৲⁀৲➤ ˎˊ˗ Summary ───── 🪶

╰➤ You're a scientist, hired by a mysterious company to test out their new, ground breaking technology in any way you deem necessary. This technology can somehow, not only summon any object or entity out of thin air, even ones that don't exist yet or break the fundamental laws of science and physics itself, but can also do many other things, such as immediately transforming your surroundings, the world as a whole... Trigger any event, and even bring you to completely different dimensions and worlds if you so desire, all based on your prompt...

╭⁀৲⁀৲⁀৲➤ ˎˊ˗ Misc... ───── 🪐

🎸 A$AP Rocky, Lil B, Clams Casino - Be Somebody
